    Index

    A C G H L M R U 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    A

    actionPerformed(ActionEvent) - Method in class ui.GUI
    Handles action events for the GUI components.

    C

    CashierMain() - Method in class ui.CashierPanel
    Launches the cashier panel
    CashierPanel - Class in ui
    This class handles the cashier interface of the drink ordering system, allowing cashiers to create and manage customer orders.
    CashierPanel(JFrame, DatabaseManager, GUI, ReportsPanel) - Constructor for class ui.CashierPanel
    constructor for the cashier panel, initializes database connection and references to other UI components.
    Checkout() - Method in class ui.CashierPanel
    checkout function that writes the current order to the database, including drinks, toppings, and order details.

    G

    GUI - Class in ui
    Graphical user interface for the drink ordering and management system.
    GUI() - Constructor for class ui.GUI
     

    H

    handleAddItem(String) - Method in class ui.CashierPanel
    button handler for adding an item to the order, updates the order table, total cost label, and internal drink state.
    handleCheckout() - Method in class ui.CashierPanel
    button handler to intialize checkout process
    handleDeleteItem(String) - Method in class ui.CashierPanel
    handler for deleting an item from the order, updates the order table, total cost label, and internal drink state accordingly.

    L

    lastZReportDate - Static variable in class ui.GUI
     

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class ui.GUI
    Entry point of the application.
    MainMenu() - Method in class ui.GUI
    Launches the main menu of the application, allowing users to choose between manager and cashier interfaces.
    ManagerEmployeesPage() - Method in class ui.manager.ManagerPanel
    employee management page, add and update employee information
    ManagerInventoryPage() - Method in class ui.manager.ManagerPanel
    inventory management page, add and update ingredients
    ManagerMain() - Method in class ui.manager.ManagerPanel
    intializer for the manager panel, sets up the main dashboard with buttons to access different management features.
    ManagerMenuPage() - Method in class ui.manager.ManagerPanel
    menu management page, add and update menu items
    ManagerPanel - Class in ui.manager
    This class handles the manager interface of the drink ordering system, providing functionality for all mangment features except the reports page which is handled by the ReportsPanel class.
    ManagerPanel(JFrame, DatabaseManager, GUI) - Constructor for class ui.manager.ManagerPanel
    constructor for the manager panel, initializes database connection and references to other UI components.
    ManagerReportsPage() - Method in class ui.manager.ReportsPanel
    reports page, sets up ui with table to display reports data and buttons to generate different reports

    R

    ReloadMenuItems() - Method in class ui.CashierPanel
    reload menu items from database into hashtable for easy reading since there are so few
    ReportsPanel - Class in ui.manager
    This class handles the reports interface of the drink ordering system, providing functionality for generating various sales and inventory reports.
    ReportsPanel(JFrame, DatabaseManager, GUI, ManagerPanel) - Constructor for class ui.manager.ReportsPanel
    constructor for the reports panel, initializes database connection and references to other UI components.
    ResetFrame() - Static method in class ui.GUI
    resets the main frame by removing all components, allowing for a fresh UI to be rendered.
    runZReport(LocalDate, DefaultTableModel) - Method in class ui.manager.ReportsPanel
    runs the destructive z report

    U

    ui - package ui
     
    ui.manager - package ui.manager
     
    updateReportTotalsForOrder(float, Timestamp) - Method in class ui.manager.ReportsPanel
    updates the daily and hourly report totals after an order is completed
